name: Mark's Eggless Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Gradually add water while stirring until well mixed.
3. Add enough water until you achieve the desired consistency. Use less for thicker batter or more for thinner batter.
4. Heat a very lightly oiled skillet over medium heat.
5. Pour batter into the skillet, cooking until brown on one side.
6. Flip and cook the other side until brown.
VARIATION: Substitute the wholewheat flour with millet flour or buckwheat, omitting the wheat germ.
